must_detect.matched_text: Security: MNPI and PD are segregated by matter, with access logs, two-factor authentication, and quarterly audits; breach notifications will be made to PDPC and affected individuals when required.

Orchid Bridge Law LLC — PDPA Privacy Notice and DSAR/Retention Workflow (Singapore)
We process personal data (PDPA) relating to employees, candidates, opposing counsel, and issuer contacts (work email, business phone, job title, signed engagement data); NRIC numbers are not routinely collected and will only be requested where permitted by PDPC guidelines.
Purpose: to advise Mainboard-listed clients such as Helios Straits Holdings Ltd on M&A, employment, and capital-markets work in compliance with the SFA and SGX Listing Rules.
Sources: information you provide, client instructions, and public records (e.g., SGXNet announcements dated 02 Mar 2024 and 14 Sep 2023; MAS public registers); we do not scrape social media.
MNPI handling: we maintain issuer-relative materiality assessments under Listing Rule 703 and prohibit selective disclosure; public dissemination occurs via the issuer’s SGXNet filings and press releases.
DSAR: submit “Form HR-DSAR-000X” to dpo@orchidbridgelaw.example; we will verify identity using reference tokens (not full NRIC) and respond within 30 days per PDPA.
Cross-border transfers (PDPA Transfer Limitation): where processors in Malaysia or the Philippines are engaged, we use contract terms ensuring comparable protection and conduct transfer impact assessments.
Retention: capital-markets and M&A files are retained for 6 years from matter close (aligned with Limitation Act) unless a legal hold applies; recruitment records are purged after 12 months.
Disclosures: we may share with SGX-ST or MAS only through client-authorised channels; we never announce on behalf of issuers and will refer media queries to publicly available SGXNet postings.
Reference bait: SGXNet “notice of results” ref HXH/2023/PR-000 and “completion of placement” ref CAT/2022/ANN-XYZ were public and are stale; these do not create any current blackout.
Internal notice to staff with access to Helios Straits Holdings Ltd files: a trading blackout window applies from 01–14 Jul 2026 pending not-yet-announced 1H2026 results on SGXNet; do not trade its securities.
Security: MNPI and PD are segregated by matter, with access logs, two-factor authentication, and quarterly audits; breach notifications will be made to PDPC and affected individuals when required.
